{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Vendor FAQ{% endblock %} {% block content %}

Vendor FAQ

Click a topic to expand it, then click any question to see the answer.

Registration — How to register and what to expect
How do I register as a vendor?

Click Vendor Login on the homepage and enter your email address. You'll receive a one-time verification code — enter it to log in. Once logged in, click Register to start your application. Fill out the form with your business information, select a booth type, accept the vendor agreement, and review your submission before submitting.

Can I edit my registration after submitting?

No. Once submitted, your registration cannot be edited. If you need to make changes, contact the organizers with your registration ID.

How do I register multiple booths?

Each booth requires a separate registration. After submitting your first registration, you can start a new one from the vendor dashboard. Each registration is reviewed independently by the organizers.

Approval & Payment — What happens after you submit
What happens after I submit my registration?

Your registration is placed in Pending Review status. The event organizers will review your application and either approve or decline it. You'll receive an email notification when a decision is made. You can check your status anytime on your vendor dashboard.

How do I pay after being approved?

Once approved, visit your registration detail page from the vendor dashboard. You'll see a payment section with the amount due and a secure card payment form. Payment is processed through Stripe — your card information never touches our server.

How urgently should I pay after being approved?

You should pay as soon as possible. Your booth slot is reserved when you're approved, but the organizers may revoke your approval if payment is not received in a reasonable time frame. Your registration is only fully confirmed once payment is complete.

{% if settings and settings.refund_policy %}
What is the refund policy?

{{ settings.refund_policy | sanitize_html }}

Refunds can only be issued by the event organizers after a paid registration is cancelled. If you haven't paid yet, you can withdraw your registration instead.

{% endif %}
Insurance — What's required and how to upload
Do I need insurance to participate?

Yes. All vendors are required to provide proof of liability insurance. You can upload your insurance certificate through the insurance page on your vendor dashboard.

When should I upload my insurance document?

Upload your insurance document as soon as possible, ideally when you submit your registration or shortly after. The organizers review insurance separately from your registration.

{% if settings and settings.insurance_instructions %}
Where can I get insurance?

{{ settings.insurance_instructions | sanitize_html }}

{% endif %}
Understanding Your Status — What each status means
What do the different statuses mean?
StatusWhat It MeansWhat To Do
Pending ReviewYour registration has been submitted and is waiting for organizer review.No action needed. You'll be notified by email when a decision is made.
ApprovedYour registration has been approved. A booth slot is reserved for you.Complete payment as soon as possible to confirm your spot.
PaidPayment is complete. Your booth is confirmed.No further action needed. Make sure your insurance document is uploaded.
DeclinedThe organizers were unable to approve your registration.Check the reason provided. Contact the organizers if you have questions.
CancelledYour paid registration has been cancelled by the organizers.Check your email for refund details.
WithdrawnYou voluntarily withdrew your registration.This is permanent. Submit a new registration if you change your mind.
Withdrawal — How to withdraw your registration
How do I withdraw my registration?

Open your registration from the vendor dashboard and scroll down to the Withdraw Registration section. Click the button, optionally provide a reason, and confirm. You'll receive an email confirmation.

When can I withdraw?

You can withdraw while your registration is in Pending Review or Approved status. Once you've paid, only the event organizers can cancel your registration.

Can I undo a withdrawal?

No. Withdrawal is permanent and cannot be undone. If you change your mind, you'll need to submit a new registration (if registration is still open).

What happens to my booth slot if I withdraw after being approved?

Your reserved booth slot is freed immediately and becomes available for other vendors.

Contact & Support — How to reach the organizers
How do I contact the event organizers? {% if settings and settings.contact_email %}

Email us at {{ settings.contact_email }}. Include your registration ID if you have one — it helps us locate your application quickly.

{% else %}

Contact information will be provided by the event organizers.

{% endif %}
I didn't receive an email notification. What should I do?

Check your spam or junk folder first. Email notifications are sent automatically but may be delayed or filtered. You can always check your current status by logging in to your vendor dashboard.

{% endblock %}
